description_long: This is a pair of modern, narrow two-story houses with flat and gable roof sections, set on elongated lots with driveways and small front yards. The facades feature a mix of white, orange-brown brick, and dark gray roofing, with large windows providing ample natural light. Each house has a dedicated driveway with carports or garages, and the rear yards are green and open, suitable for outdoor activities. The side elevations reveal staircases and split-level access, as well as privacy walls separating the properties. The houses are designed with clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and a focus on functional urban living. The overall layout suggests a contemporary duplex or townhouse configuration, ideal for dense urban neighborhoods.
description: A pair of modern, narrow two-story houses with brick and white facades, large windows, and private driveways, set on elongated urban lots.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveways, carports, and main entrances with large windows and minimal landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the split-level access, exterior staircases, and privacy walls between the properties.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the green backyards, large rear windows, and the clean, rectangular lines of the houses.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the brick facades, additional windows, and the continuation of the driveways and carports.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways feature minimalistic doors, small porches, and steps leading from the driveway, with no columns or heavy ornamentation.
